---
title: "DGE Markdown Analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    df_print: paged
params:
  counts: "counts.tsv"
  metadata: "metadata.csv"
  outdir: "."
  tool: "deseq2"
  batch_method: "none"
  batch_col: null
  group_col: "group"
  covariates: null
  sample_col: "sample"
  metadata_sep: "auto"
  control: null
  treatment: null
  p_threshold: 0.05
  fc_threshold: 1.0
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(jsonlite)
if (params$tool == "deseq2") library(DESeq2)
if (!is.null(params$batch_method) && params$batch_method == "combat") library(sva)

read_metadata_flexible <- function(path, sep_opt = "auto") {
  if (sep_opt == "tab") return(read.delim(path, header=TRUE, check.names=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE))
  if (sep_opt == "comma") return(read.csv(path, header=TRUE, check.names=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE))
  if (sep_opt == "semicolon") return(read.csv(path, header=TRUE, sep=";", check.names=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE))

  first <- readLines(path, n = 1, warn = FALSE)
  sep <- "\t"
  if (grepl(";", first, fixed = TRUE) && !grepl("\t", first, fixed = TRUE) && !grepl(",", first, fixed = TRUE)) {
    sep <- ";"
  } else if (grepl(",", first, fixed = TRUE) && !grepl("\t", first, fixed = TRUE)) {
    sep <- ","
  } else if (grepl("\t", first, fixed = TRUE)) {
    sep <- "\t"
  }
  read.table(path, header=TRUE, sep=sep, check.names=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE, quote="\"", comment.char="")
}

build_design_formula <- function(group_col, covars) {
  terms <- c(covars, group_col)
  as.formula(paste("~", paste(terms, collapse = " + ")))
}

parse_covariates <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || is.na(x) || trimws(x) == "") return(character(0))
  out <- unlist(strsplit(x, ",", fixed = TRUE))
  out <- trimws(out)
  out <- out[out != ""]
  unique(out)
}
```

## Load Data

```{r load_data}
counts <- read.table(params$counts, header=TRUE, sep="\t", row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read_metadata_flexible(params$metadata, params$metadata_sep)

# Ensure metadata matches counts
metadata_samples <- as.character(metadata[[params$sample_col]])
common_samples <- intersect(colnames(counts), metadata_samples)
counts <- counts[, common_samples, drop=FALSE]
metadata <- metadata[match(common_samples, metadata_samples), , drop=FALSE]

# Group column as factor
grp_raw <- trimws(as.character(metadata[[params$group_col]]))
grp_raw[grp_raw == ""] <- NA
metadata[[params$group_col]] <- as.factor(grp_raw)

# Filter for control and treatment
samples_to_keep <- !is.na(metadata[[params$group_col]]) & metadata[[params$group_col]] %in% c(params$control, params$treatment)
counts <- counts[, samples_to_keep, drop=FALSE]
metadata <- metadata[samples_to_keep, , drop=FALSE]
metadata[[params$group_col]] <- droplevels(metadata[[params$group_col]])
metadata[[params$group_col]] <- relevel(metadata[[params$group_col]], ref=params$control)

covars <- parse_covariates(params$covariates)
if (length(covars) > 0) {
  for (cv in covars) {
    if (is.character(metadata[[cv]])) metadata[[cv]] <- as.factor(metadata[[cv]])
  }
}

# Filtering low counts
keep <- rowSums(cpm(counts) > 1) >= (min(table(metadata[[params$group_col]])))
counts <- counts[keep,]
```

## DGE Analysis

```{r analysis}
res_df <- NULL
normalized_counts <- NULL

if (params$tool == "deseq2") {
  design_formula <- build_design_formula(params$group_col, covars)
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = round(counts), colData = metadata, design = design_formula)
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  res <- results(dds, contrast = c(params$group_col, params$treatment, params$control))
  normalized_counts <- counts(dds, normalized=TRUE)
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  colnames(res_df)[colnames(res_df) == "padj"] <- "adj.P.Val"
  colnames(res_df)[colnames(res_df) == "log2FoldChange"] <- "logFC"
  colnames(res_df)[colnames(res_df) == "pvalue"] <- "P.Value"
} else if (params$tool == "edger") {
  dge <- DGEList(counts=counts, group=metadata[[params$group_col]])
  dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)
  design <- model.matrix(build_design_formula(params$group_col, covars), data=metadata)
  dge <- estimateDisp(dge, design)
  fit <- glmQLFit(dge, design)
  qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef=ncol(design))
  res <- topTags(qlf, n=Inf)
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  normalized_counts <- cpm(dge)
  colnames(res_df)[colnames(res_df) == "FDR"] <- "adj.P.Val"
  colnames(res_df)[colnames(res_df) == "PValue"] <- "P.Value"
} else if (params$tool == "limma") {
  dge <- DGEList(counts=counts)
  dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)
  design <- model.matrix(build_design_formula(params$group_col, covars), data=metadata)
  v <- voom(dge, design, plot=FALSE)
  fit <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit <- eBayes(fit)
  res <- topTable(fit, coef=ncol(design), n=Inf)
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  normalized_counts <- v$E
}

res_df$gene_id <- rownames(res_df)
res_df$significance <- "Not Significant"
res_df$significance[res_df$adj.P.Val < params$p_threshold & res_df$logFC > params$fc_threshold] <- "Upregulated"
res_df$significance[res_df$adj.P.Val < params$p_threshold & res_df$logFC < -params$fc_threshold] <- "Downregulated"
```

## Results Summary

```{r summary}
table(res_df$significance)
```

## Volcano Plot

```{r volcano}
p_volcano <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(P.Value), color=significance)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.4, size=1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Upregulated"="#ff6b6b", "Downregulated"="#00d9ff", "Not Significant"="#888888")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept=c(-params$fc_threshold, params$fc_threshold), linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(params$p_threshold), linetype="dashed") +
  ggtitle(paste("Volcano Plot:", params$treatment, "vs", params$control))

ggplotly(p_volcano)
```

## PCA Plot

```{r pca}
if (!is.null(normalized_counts)) {
  pca_data <- t(log2(normalized_counts + 1))
  pca <- prcomp(pca_data)
  pca_df <- as.data.frame(pca$x)
  pca_df$Sample <- rownames(pca_df)
  pca_df$Group <- metadata[[params$group_col]]
  
  percentVar <- round(100 * pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2))
  
  p_pca <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color=Group)) +
    geom_point(size=3) +
    xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
    ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) +
    ggtitle("PCA Plot") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ggplotly(p_pca)
}
```

## Top 50 DEGs

```{r top50}
top50 <- res_df %>%
  filter(significance != "Not Significant") %>%
  arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
  head(50)
top50
```
